pk_tuples.dose_original: single drop TP-03 lotilaner 0.25% ophthalmic solution each eye
pk_tuples.notes: Study TRS-012, TP-03 (lotilaner 0.25%) single topical ocular administration, both eyes. Cmax 0.596 ng/mL, AUC0-12 5.75 ng·h/mL, AUC0-24 9.98 ng·h/mL. Dose mg not readily convertible—topical ophthalmic.

pk_tuples.dose_original: single drop TP-03 lotilaner 0.25% BID each eye, Day 42
pk_tuples.notes: Study TRS-012, TP-03 BID for 42 days, Day 42 parameters. Cmax 17.8 ng/mL, AUC0-24 293 ng·h/mL. Terminal t1/2 1400 h (58.3 d), effective t1/2 264 h (11 d). Accumulation ratio Cmax 33.4. Not at steady state.
